calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-14-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Chris Cole for Michael Bacon.

Mr. Cole reported that what is at issue is which entity should the distribution be made to, and that he requests that distribution of the Trust. Furthermore, Mr. Cole stated that a distribution made to the conservatorship will require an extra step of a filing a petition. The Court confirmed that distribution needs to for to the conservatorship and once that it completed, the Court can entertain a petition for substituted judgment. The Court ordered distribution to Wilbur Wong as Conservator of Lenore Pickering. The First and Final Account and Status Report of Administrator, etc. was granted (subject to review of order) with the provision that assests be distributied to Wilbur Wong.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.
